issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss or complete the duplicate tasks as appropriate.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked as Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper suppression filters for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were generated after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The issue was identified on a deal where Paul was replaced by Julie Yocum. The fix was confirmed by Luis.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually resend any automated agent-facing emails to ensure the correct LO information is reflected.

issues.title: TC workflow and tasks not triggering when deal re-enters Offer Accepted after being flipped back to an earlier stage
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed due to a fallen contract, and then updated back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and associated tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that Offer Accepted was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: For deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window, manually enroll the deal into the TC workflow.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling in TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving tasks for these deals. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed a fix was applied. The root cause was not explicitly disclosed by HubSpot.
issues.workaround: For MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted before the fix date that did not trigger TC tasks, manually enroll the deal into the TC workflow and send any required closing information emails manually.
